hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.generated.ts) echo "Refusing to edit $f -- this is a generated file. Edits will be overwritten." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */src/renderer/*.ts) npx eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1 | tail -5 ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
